title: Do More of the Good Stuff Basically
excerpt: JC stopped by a local paper store that is closing (but hopefully opening in a new location) and picked up the book, Do More of What Makes You Feel Alive . It's inspiring and full of quotes and wisdom. It's…
body: JC stopped by a local paper store that is closing (but hopefully opening in a new location) and picked up the book, Do More of What Makes You Feel Alive. It's inspiring and full of quotes and wisdom. It's something I am constantly working on. Trying to carve out enough time for creative endeavors while also collaborating with others and seeking meaningful work for all involved. Love sharing my journey with you on a variety of platforms, appreciate you following along. Also - only a couple days away from our online brush lettering workshop which launches on August 4! Would love to hear from you - What makes you feel alive?
